description: Dynamic bridge between scheduled runs. Each run reads this file, applies its learnings, does its work, then OVERWRITES this file with updated context for the next run. This is the memory of the intelligence system.

market_regime.label: DEADLINE_EVE_BINARY
market_regime.key_risk: Trump 8pm ET April 7 Hormuz deadline expires TONIGHT (5:30am IST April 8). Outcome unknown at EOD write. April 8 open will be a binary gap event.
market_regime.regime_note: April 7 session delivered a SURPRISING RALLY (+0.68%, Nifty to 23,123.65) despite the war premium. IT sector drove gains (HCLTECH +2.73%, INFY +2.54%, TCS +2.66%) — USD strength/global tech rotation. Market chose 'wait and see' on Trump deadline. BUT: that patience ends tonight. By April 8 open (9:15 AM IST), the outcome of Trump's 8pm ET deadline will be known. THREE regimes possible: (A) ESCALATION — strikes on Iran → Brent $120+ → Nifty gap-down to 22,000-22,500; (B) EXTENSION — deadline pushed again → modest gap-down + continued war premium; (C) DEAL — Iran accepts Hormuz protocol → Brent crashes → Nifty gaps up to 23,200+. Morning brief MUST establish which regime before any other analysis.
market_regime.session_forecast_accuracy_note: April 7 forecast was WRONG (predicted FLAT-TO-DOWN, actual UP +0.68%). Lesson: IT sector can decouple from geopolitical risk when USD strengthens and global tech rotates. Future forecasts must include IT/USD correlation as a separate bullish factor that can override war premium in short sessions.

open_predictions.thesis: Falls to ₹160–170 by May 28 on crude-driven GRM compression
open_predictions.note: MRPL rose +0.22% today to ₹179.33 — moved away from target on broad market recovery. But Brent at $110.15 (above $110 threshold) and diesel export tax maintain thesis. Escalation scenario tonight (Trump strikes) would spike Brent to $118-120+ and could accelerate MRPL toward target ₹160-170 faster. Stock is ₹9-19 above target range. Thesis intact, time required.
open_predictions.check_on_next_run: What happened Trump deadline? If escalation → Brent $120+ → MRPL should be moving toward target. Check MRPL open price April 8. If deal scenario → Brent falls → P002 thesis weakens, reassess.

open_predictions.thesis: Nifty tests 22,000–22,200 by May 10 on FII selling + Iran risk
open_predictions.note: MAJOR DEVELOPMENT: Nifty RALLIED +0.68% today despite war premium — moved AWAY from target (now 923 pts above target zone). BUT: Trump deadline expires tonight. April 8 gap-down to 22,395 is the base case per market analysis. If strikes → gap to 22,000-22,500 (P003 target hit). If extension → sideways/down toward 22,500 over days. Deal scenario = P003 fails. Maintaining confidence at 3 — today's rally is noise vs the structural geopolitical thesis. April 8 is decisive.
open_predictions.check_on_next_run: PRIORITY: Did Nifty gap-down on April 8 open? If gap to 22,200 or below = P003 EARLY RESOLUTION (score as RIGHT). If gap-down but recovers above 22,500 = thesis still active. If gap-up on deal = P003 confidence drops to 1, reassess.

open_predictions.thesis: Closes above ₹430 by May 28 — domestic demand insulation
open_predictions.note: Thesis strongly confirming. ₹463 close (+0.75% today) = ₹33 buffer above ₹430 target with 51 days remaining. Domestic demand insulation validated — rose with broader market but insulated from crude. Even extreme gap-down on April 8 would need -7.1% from current for thesis to be at risk. Near-certain prediction. Watch IREDA Apr 16 earnings for PSU sector rotation.
open_predictions.check_on_next_run: Coal India open April 8. If >₹445 = thesis very safe despite any gap-down. If <₹430 = URGENT flag (would require extreme event). Confirm thesis still intact.

pending_outcomes_to_score.score_condition: Did Nifty close at or below 22,200 at any point before May 10?
pending_outcomes_to_score.early_resolution_trigger: If April 8 gap-down results in Nifty close ≤22,200 → score P003 as RIGHT immediately
pending_outcomes_to_score.current_status: OPEN — Nifty at 23,123 (923 pts above target). April 8 deadline outcome is the next major test.

pending_outcomes_to_score.score_condition: Is COAL INDIA above ₹430 at close on May 28?
pending_outcomes_to_score.early_resolution_trigger: If Coal India falls below ₹430 and stays there for 3 days = flag for emergency review
pending_outcomes_to_score.current_status: OPEN — Coal India at ₹463 (7.2% above target, 51 days remaining). Thesis almost certain to resolve RIGHT.

session_forecasting.last_error: April 7 — forecast DOWN -0.8%, actual UP +0.68%. IT sector decoupled from geopolitical risk.

pattern_alerts.description: FII selling + global risk-off = actual price move exceeds model estimate by 1.5–2x
pattern_alerts.status: WATCHING — April 7 FII data needed. If >₹8,000 Cr again = potential 2nd occurrence. But requires formal WRONG prediction with this root cause for framework promotion.

last_threshold_event.note: Apr 7 FII data not yet available

new_pattern_emerging.description: IT sector decoupling from war premium when USD strengthens — can create counter-trend rally on geopolitical risk days
new_pattern_emerging.evidence: April 7: HCLTECH +2.73%, INFY +2.54%, TCS +2.66% drove Nifty +0.68% despite Iran war premium and weak open
new_pattern_emerging.status: OBSERVING — single data point. Will formalize if repeated.
new_pattern_emerging.proposed_factor: M011_IT_USD_DECOUPLING — when USD strengthens >0.5% in a session AND IT stocks see >1.5% rally, index may diverge from geopolitical news direction

framework_updates_pending.name: FII Panic Threshold
framework_updates_pending.description: Track FII daily sell quantum vs 30-day average. >2x average = panic mode = double all downside estimates
framework_updates_pending.evidence: P007 wrong because FII sold ₹9,931 Cr vs avg ₹4,000 Cr — panic threshold not modeled
framework_updates_pending.promote_when: PAT001 has 2+ occurrences (needs 1 more WRONG prediction with same root cause)

framework_updates_pending.name: IT-USD Decoupling Factor
framework_updates_pending.description: When global USD strengthens AND Indian IT stocks rally >1.5%, treat as separate bullish force that can partially offset bearish geopolitical signals on short-term forecasts
framework_updates_pending.evidence: April 7 session — IT sector drove +0.68% Nifty rally despite Iran war premium. Session forecast was WRONG because this factor was not modeled.

priority_checks_for_next_run.check: CRITICAL — FIRST ACTION: What happened at Trump's 8pm ET April 7 deadline? US strikes on Iran? Extension? Iran deal?
priority_checks_for_next_run.why: This single event determines the entire April 8 session, all prediction paths, and portfolio action urgency.
priority_checks_for_next_run.where_to_check: Search 'Trump Iran strikes April 8 2026', 'Hormuz April 8', 'Iran ceasefire accepted'

action_on_result.strikes: → Regime: ESCALATION_CONFIRMED. Execute A002 (INDIGO sell 30-50%). Log P003 direction. Check if Nifty opens ≤22,200 → score P003 RIGHT.
action_on_result.extension: → Regime: WAR_PREMIUM_EXTENDED. Hold all. Check FII data. Monitor Nifty 22,500 support.
action_on_result.deal: → Regime: DE-ESCALATION_REAL. P002/P003 theses at risk. Execute A001 (SWIGGY sell on morning strength). Reassess all bearish predictions.

priority_checks_for_next_run.check: FII flow for April 7 — was it above ₹8,000 Cr (PAT001) or moderated (reflecting today's recovery)?
priority_checks_for_next_run.why: If consecutive >₹8,000 Cr FII selling days → PAT001 pattern reinforced. If FII moderated → suggests IT-led recovery was FII-driven (buying IT) while selling other sectors.
priority_checks_for_next_run.where_to_check: NSDL FPI data, 5paisa FII/DII page, NSE FII report

priority_checks_for_next_run.check: Nifty April 8 open — gap-down or gap-up? And how much?
priority_checks_for_next_run.why: If gap-down to 22,200 or below → P003 may resolve immediately. If gap-up → deal scenario and all bearish theses need reassessment.
priority_checks_for_next_run.where_to_check: GIFT Nifty pre-market (9:00-9:15 AM IST), then NSE open at 9:15 AM

priority_checks_for_next_run.check: Brent crude on April 8 morning — is it above $115 (strikes), $108-115 (extension), or below $100 (deal)?
priority_checks_for_next_run.why: Brent is the single best real-time proxy for geopolitical risk direction. Check before market opens.

priority_checks_for_next_run.check: Did user execute A001 (SWIGGY sell) or A002 (INDIGO partial sell)?
priority_checks_for_next_run.why: A002 remains CRITICAL — INDIGO has maximum downside exposure in escalation scenario. User should act pre-open on April 8.

priority_checks_for_next_run.check: Coal India open April 8 — confirm still above ₹445 despite any gap-down.
priority_checks_for_next_run.why: P005 thesis safety check. Buffer of ₹33 makes it near-certain but extreme events can surprise.

priority_checks_for_next_run.check: ASTRA MICRO — approaching ₹1,000 level. Consider partial profit booking recommendation if near/above ₹1,000.
priority_checks_for_next_run.why: Up +77% from cost. War premium stock — if deal scenario materializes, defense premium unwinds rapidly.

questions_to_answer_next_run: CRITICAL: Did Trump strike Iran overnight? What is Hormuz status April 8 morning?
What was FII flow for April 7? Confirm PAT001 status.
Did Nifty gap-down below 22,500 or 22,200 on April 8 open?
Has the user executed A001 (SWIGGY sell) or A002 (INDIGO partial sell)?
Is ASTRA MICRO above ₹1,000? Should Vastav take partial profits?
What is Coal India opening April 8 — still safely above ₹445?
Any earnings/corporate actions announced for IRCON, IRFC, or other PSU holdings?
prompt_for_morning_brief:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Today is {{DATE}}. Run the morning intelligence briefing.

CONTEXT FROM LAST RUN (Apr 7 EOD):
- **TRUMP DEADLINE STATUS:** 8pm ET April 7 deadline for Hormuz reopening expired overnight. This is the FIRST thing to determine — did US strike Iran, did Trump extend, or did Iran accept?
- **April 7 Close:** Nifty 23,123.65 (+0.68%). IT-led rally (HCLTECH +2.73%, INFY +2.54%, TCS +2.66%). Market chose 'wait and see' before deadline.
- **Brent EOD:** $110.15 — still above $110 threshold.
- **ASTRA MICRO:** +5.61% to ₹996.90 — approaching ₹1,000 level. Defense war play.
- **PREDICTION STATUS:**
  - P002 (MRPL bearish): Conf **2⭐ RECOVERING** — stock at ₹179.33, ₹9-19 above target ₹160-170
  - P003 (NIFTY bearish): Conf **3⭐ CONTESTED** — rally to 23,123 was thesis headwind; deadline outcome tonight = binary reset
  - P005 (Coal India bullish): Conf **5⭐ STRONG** — ₹463, ₹33 above ₹430 target, 51 days left
- **SESSION FORECAST NOTE:** April 7 forecast was WRONG (predicted down, actual up). IT-USD decoupling was the missed factor. Add M011 check to future session forecasts.

ACTIONS FOR THIS RUN:
1. **PRIORITY 1 (CRITICAL — DO FIRST):** Determine Trump deadline outcome. Search: 'Trump Iran strikes April 8 2026', 'Hormuz April 8 ceasefire'. Three outcomes: STRIKES → gap-down regime; EXTENSION → sideways war premium; DEAL → regime change to de-escalation.
2. **PRIORITY 2:** Check Nifty April 8 open. If open ≤22,200 → score P003 as RIGHT immediately. If large gap-down → execute A002 (INDIGO sell 30-50%).
3. **PRIORITY 3:** Get April 7 FII data. If >₹8,000 Cr sell → PAT001 has 2nd data point (still needs formal WRONG prediction for framework promotion). If FII bought or <₹4,000 Cr → IT recovery was FII-driven rotation.
4. **PRIORITY 4:** Check ASTRA MICRO price vs ₹1,000. Consider partial profit-taking recommendation.
5. Update actions.json urgency based on deadline outcome. A002 (INDIGO) urgency = CRITICAL if Brent >$115.
6. Update open predictions with April 8 morning prices.
7. Write morning briefing to daily-briefings/{{DATE}}-morning.md.

ACCURACY LEARNINGS TO APPLY:
- PAT001 still WATCHING — apply 1.5x downside multiplier to all bearish predictions when FII sell >₹8,000 Cr
- **NEW LEARNING (Apr 7):** IT/USD decoupling can drive counter-trend index rally even in war premium regime. Before forecasting FLAT-TO-DOWN, check: (1) Is USD strengthening? (2) Are global tech stocks in rally mode? If both YES = IT could provide 0.3-0.8% upside buffer.
- **Geopolitical Verification Protocol:** 'Deadline passed' ≠ 'de-escalation'. Require confirmed outcome (strikes OR signed agreement OR Hormuz reopening) before adjusting regime.
- **Thesis Invalidation — P002:** ONLY if Brent <$95 for 5+ days
- **Thesis Invalidation — P003:** ONLY if Nifty closes >23,500 for 3 days AND FII inflow >₹5,000 Cr/day

OUTPUT FORMAT:
(1) Trump deadline outcome + regime determination, (2) Nifty open + April 8 session direction, (3) FII April 7 data + PAT001 status update, (4) P002/P003/P005 morning price observations, (5) ASTRA MICRO ₹1,000 analysis, (6) Updated action urgencies, (7) Key levels to watch for the session
prompt_for_eod_wrap:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Run the end-of-day wrap for {{DATE}}.

FIRST: Read data/next-run-context.json for full context.

ACTIONS FOR THIS RUN:
1. Run fetch-prices.py to get official closing prices
2. Search: 'India market close {{DATE}}', 'Nifty Sensex close today {{DATE}}'
3. Search: 'FII DII net flow India {{DATE}}'
4. SCORE PREDICTIONS DUE: Read predictions-all.json. For EVERY prediction where check_date <= {{DATE}} AND outcome == null → research price, determine RIGHT/WRONG/PARTIAL, set outcome fields, update accuracy-meta.json
5. For any WRONG predictions: run RCA (root_cause, missing_factor, signal_missed, proposed_factor) → check if it matches existing pattern (PAT001, PAT002) → promote pattern if 2+ occurrences
6. Update confidence on all open predictions with today's closing prices
7. Recalculate accuracy-meta.json
8. GENERATE NEW PREDICTIONS (MANDATORY — MUST HAPPEN EVERY EOD):
   - Generate 2-3 new predictions based on today's intelligence and regime
   - Assign sequential pred_ids (check max in predictions-all.json, increment)
   - Include: pred_id, horizon (at least one 7D), date, stock, prediction, entry_price (today's close), target, confidence, category, check_date, reasoning, factors_checked, outcome: null
   - Append to predictions-all.json AND create predictions/predictions-{{DATE}}.json
   - Rules: multi-factor theses only; at least one 7D for fast feedback; no duplicate open theses
9. Check PAT001 (FII_PANIC_OVERRIDE) and PAT002 (IT_USD_DECOUPLING) — any new occurrences? Promote to framework if 2+ confirmed.
10. Generate market-forecasts/{{TOMORROW_DATE}}-forecast.json for next session
11. Write EOD brief to daily-briefings/{{DATE}}-eod.md (include new predictions section)
12. CRITICAL: Update next-run-context.json with: updated regime, open_predictions (include new ones), priority_checks, evolved prompt templates, session forecast accuracy note

ACCURACY FEEDBACK LOOP:
- Track session forecast direction accuracy (was yesterday's forecast RIGHT or WRONG vs today's actual?)
- If M011 (IT-USD decoupling) applies for second time → promote to framework factor
prompt_for_weekly_intelligence:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Run the weekly intelligence review for week ending {{DATE}}.

SCOPE:
1. Score all predictions that matured this week
2. Full L2 RCA on all WRONG predictions from the week
3. L3 trend analysis: is accuracy improving or degrading? Why?
4. Factor performance: which signals were most/least predictive this week?
5. Framework evolution: any factors to promote, modify, or retire?
6. Portfolio review: any holdings to re-evaluate based on thesis changes?
7. Macro outlook: next 4 weeks — key events, risks, opportunities
8. Generate 5 new predictions for next week with full signal backing
9. Write weekly intelligence report to daily-briefings/weekly-{{DATE}}.md
10. CRITICAL: Update next-run-context.json with evolved framework, new patterns, updated prompts

EVOLUTION MECHANISM:
- Check accuracy_meta.json for factor_performance
- Any factor with <40% accuracy in last 10 uses: flag for review
- Any factor with >80% accuracy: increase weight in future predictions
- Update prompt templates to reflect evolved framework
- Evaluate PAT001 (FII_PANIC_OVERRIDE) and M011 (IT_USD_DECOUPLING) for framework promotion
- Week of April 7-11 will include the Iran binary resolution — major framework learning opportunity

scheduled_task_definitions.name: eod_wrap
scheduled_task_definitions.output: daily-briefings/YYYY-MM-DD-eod.md + predictions-history.json update + accuracy-meta.json update + market-forecasts.json + next-run-context.json update

scheduled_task_definitions.name: weekly_intelligence
scheduled_task_definitions.output: daily-briefings/weekly-YYYY-MM-DD.md + signal-framework.json update + next-run-context.json major update
